name: 3-node-breast-cancer-deg-pipeline
description: Compare ER+ vs ER- breast cancer tumors to identify differentially expressed genes using GSE25066 and GSE20194 (GPL96 platform)
research_question: Compare estrogen receptor positive (ER+) vs estrogen receptor negative (ER-) breast cancer tumors to identify differentially expressed genes. Grouping by er_status column (P = positive, N = negative).

--indir.note: Node uses recursive=TRUE with pattern=expr_gene_*.csv to find gene-level expression files in each source's output directory

--map.note: merged_metadata.csv has many columns; extract sample_id + er_status into two-column CSV for downstream --map parameter

data_type_notes.method_rationale: Using limma because data is log2-transformed microarray, not raw counts — DESeq2/edgeR require integer counts

data_flow_warnings: deg requires sample_group_map (two-column CSV: sample_id, group) but merge produces merged_metadata.csv with many columns — runtime must extract er_status column into a two-column CSV inline
GSE25066 and GSE20194 may use different gene symbol conventions — merge union mode will produce NA for genes absent in one dataset
